subject: 966 Events Ready for PROD Promotion
body:
Porter,

There's a gap of 966 discovered events in TEST that aren't in PROD.

## Breakdown

| Source | PROD | TEST | Gap |
|--------|------|------|-----|
| harvester | 134 | 1,100 | +966 |
| porter-booker | 152 | 166 | +14 |
| fb-conditioner | 12 | 28 | +16 |

## What's in the Gap

1. **sftangowith-us** — 240 events loaded to TEST today by Harvey (oops, should have been you)
2. **tangoevents-au** — Remaining events from earlier loads
3. **Booker extrapolations** — 15 fb-conditioner-extrapolated events

## Action Needed

Run PROD loads for:

```bash
# sftangowith-us
node --experimental-strip-types scripts/load-from-harvey.ts \
  --source=sftangowith-us --app-id=1 \
  --env=prod --confirm=PROD-LOAD-APPID-1

# tangoevents-au (if any pending)
node --experimental-strip-types scripts/load-from-harvey.ts \
  --source=tangoevents-au --app-id=1 \
  --env=prod --confirm=PROD-LOAD-APPID-1
```

Note: Harvey will no longer run load scripts — that's your job. Lesson learned.

— Harvey
